type: Feature

Title

[Enhancement] Existing feature name - requested change

Current Behavior
Describe how the feature works today.

Requested Change
Describe what should be changed.

Reason for Change
Why is this change needed?

Business Impact
What value will this provide?

User Story

As a <user type>,
I want <change>,
So that <benefit>.

Acceptance Criteria

[ ]Existing behavior A is updated
[ ]New behavior B is supported
[ ]No regression to existing functionality

Affected Areas

[ ] UI
[ ] API
[ ] Database
[ ] Reporting
[ ] Documentation
[ ]Other

Risks / Considerations
Describe any potential impacts or migration concerns.
